race.comment: SPECIAL PROPHET (7) looks close to a win, finishing in the placings at his last couple of runs including a second most recently over 1800m at Bathurst when beaten a neck. Goes well at this trip, recording three minor placings and is sure to go well. SUNROE (2) did well to score at Cootamundra two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when second over 1600m at Leeton, beaten a nose. Facing a tougher assignment but he is worth serious consideration. ICONIC ROSE (10) doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race last time out over 1600m at Leeton, finishing third and beaten 1.5 lengths. Worth some thought. BURNING SENSATION (3) was a sharp improver last time at Leeton when scoring by a lip. Drawn sticky but is in the mix. LAUNCH MODE (1) was well below his best last time but has prior form that can stack right up. Not dismissing.
